verdict.rationale:
The implementation appears substantially complete — 25 files were changed covering all PRD scope areas (wire protocol, engine, monitor UI, tests, roadmap removal). However, three signals prevent a confident verdict:

1. **Unknown failure mode**: `plans: []` (empty) and `failingPlan.planId: "unknown"` indicate the failure occurred outside normal plan execution — likely at a post-merge validation gate or orchestration teardown, not within a discrete plan. This is unusual and makes it impossible to determine from the summary alone what broke.

2. **"fix: resolve validation failures" commit**: The final commit explicitly named after fixing validation failures suggests `pnpm test` / `pnpm type-check` / `pnpm build` (AC-12) were failing at some point. Whether this fix resolved those failures or partially addressed them is unknown — the build still marked itself failed after that commit.

3. **Partial context flag**: The summary itself is flagged `partial: true` with incomplete plan-level detail, reducing confidence in any automated verdict.

A human should check out the feature branch and run `pnpm test && pnpm type-check && pnpm build` to determine current state. If all pass, the feature may be ready to merge with no further automated build needed. If failures remain, the scope is narrow (fixing test/type errors on an otherwise complete implementation) and would warrant either a targeted retry or manual fixup.
completedWork: AC-1: PlanningDecisionSchema (4 V1 kinds, each with rationale) added to events.schemas.ts; planning:decision event variant added to EforgeEvent
AC-2: event-registry.ts entry for planning:decision added; DAEMON_API_VERSION bumped to 27
AC-3: emitPlanningDecision exported from decisions.ts; decision-helper-discipline.test.ts extended with grep gate for planning:decision

AC-4/AC-5/AC-6: planner.ts extended to emit plan-set-shape, per-plan-build-override, per-plan-review-override, and agent-tier-tuning decisions before planning:complete; compile-stages.ts threads defaultBuild/defaultReview into PlannerOptions
AC-7: orchestrationPlanSchema and planSetSubmissionSchema extended with optional rationale fields
AC-8: planner.md updated with rationale field instructions and examples
AC-9: reducer.ts decisions slice widened; handlePlanningDecision added routing plan-set-shape to __run__ sentinel key
AC-10: DecisionTimeline extended with planning-phase color family and four new kind tooltips
AC-11: thread-pipeline.tsx renders decisions['__run__'] as a header band above per-plan rows
AC-14: docs/roadmap.md "Plan-phase decision events" bullet removed
remainingWork: AC-12: Verify pnpm test, pnpm type-check, and pnpm build all pass on the feature branch — the "fix: resolve validation failures" commit suggests there were failures; current state unknown
AC-13: Smoke-test in a live session (manual, out of scope for automated builds, but worth confirming once AC-12 clears)
Determine root cause of the orchestration-level failure (empty plans array, unknown planId) — may indicate a daemon or merge-gate issue unrelated to the implementation itself
risks: The "fix: resolve validation failures" commit may have only partially resolved type/test failures — running pnpm type-check and pnpm test on the branch is the only way to confirm
The unknown orchestration failure mode (plans: [], planId: "unknown") could indicate a daemon-side bug that will recur on any automated retry regardless of implementation correctness
If tests still fail, the scope of remaining work is narrow but requires diagnosis before re-enqueuing to avoid another failed build cycle
